allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); c=d['collections'][0]; print\(json.dumps\({k: \(list\(v.keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(v, dict\) else \(len\(v\) if isinstance\(v, list\) else v\)\) for k, v in c.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
